title: Self should be the first argument to instance methods
description: Enforces that the 'self' argument is the first argument for instance methods.
message: Instance method should have 'self' as the first argument.
recommendation: Use consistent naming for arguments in methods

noncompliant.description: The 'self' argument is not the first argument

compliant.description: The 'self' argument is the first argument

why_is_this_an_issue: Consistent usage of 'self' argument improves code readability and maintainability.
how_to_fix: Ensure 'self' is the first argument for instance methods.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the 'self' argument is not the first argument for instance methods.

metadata.title: Self should be the first argument to instance methods
